$ bun packages/app-core/scripts/voice-interactive.mjs --list-active

Eliza-1 interactive voice — active optimizations

  ON   model
        eliza-1-2b (preferredBackend=llama-cpp, bundleManifest=eliza-1.manifest.json)
  ON   kernels (TurboQuant / QJL / PolarQuant / MTP)
        turbo3, turbo4, turbo3_tcq
  OFF  streaming OmniVoice TTS
        no fused build — the stub backend emits silence and is rejected by startVoiceSession
  OFF  VAD (RMS gate + fused Silero v5)
        Silero model not found
  ON   mic input (DesktopMicSource)
        using 'sox' to capture mono 16 kHz PCM (macOS: sox -d (rec), or ffmpeg -f avfoundation)
  ON   forced-JSON-structure grammar (Stage-1 envelope)
        buildResponseGrammar — forced {shouldRespond, replyText, contexts, ...}; single-value enums → literals; the local engine constrains the envelope with GBNF so no tokens are spent on scaffold
  ON   KV-prefix prewarm
        prewarmResponseHandler(runtime, roomId) — KV-prefill the response-handler stable prefix on speech-start; the turn controller also prewarms on speech-start
  ON   speculative-on-pause turn controller
        VoiceTurnController — prewarm on speech-start, speculative generate on speech-pause >~300ms (off the partial transcript), abort on resume, promote-or-rerun on speech-end
  ON   barge-in (pause / resume / hard-stop)
        BargeInController — speech-active → pause-tts (provisional); blip → resume-tts; ASR-confirmed words → hard-stop with an AbortSignal that propagates past TTS into the LLM/drafter
  ON   phrase-cache prewarm
        prewarmIdleVoicePhrases() on idle + playFirstAudioFiller() on speech-start; phrase chunker flushes on , . ! ? / 30 words
  ON   latency tracing
        voiceLatencyTracer — vad-trigger → audio-first-played checkpoints; derived TTFT/TTFA/TTAP; printed per-turn + as a histogram on 'p'

Missing prerequisites (5) — fix each before a real interactive turn:

  • the eliza-1-2b bundle is not fully installed (missing primary text GGUF at /Users/shawwalters/.local/state/eliza/local-inference/models/eliza-1-2b.bundle/text/eliza-1-2b-128k.gguf)
    → download it (run the harness without --list-active for the auto-download prompt) or follow docs/eliza-1-pipeline/06-test-matrix.md to acquire/convert/quantize the bundle, then place it under <state-dir>/local-inference/models/<id>.bundle/
  • eliza-1-2b does not declare native MTP metadata
    → update packages/shared/src/local-inference/catalog.ts so every eliza-1 tier has runtime.mtp
  • no real TTS backend — interactive voice needs the fused libelizainference build (the stub backend emits silence and is rejected)
    → build it: see packages/app-core/scripts/omnivoice-merged/README.md (the fused build ships real OmniVoice TTS + local ASR on macOS-Metal; stub elsewhere)
  • no ASR backend (no fused local ASR region in the bundle)
    → rebuild or download a libelizainference bundle that ships an eligible local ASR region (asr/ subdirectory).
  • no Silero VAD GGML model (vad/silero-vad-v5.1.2.ggml.bin not in the bundle, ELIZA_VAD_MODEL_PATH unset)
    → stage the Silero v5 VAD GGML model into <state-dir>/local-inference/vad/silero-vad-v5.1.2.ggml.bin or set ELIZA_VAD_MODEL_PATH
